/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libbustub_lib.so -o ../lib/libbustub_lib.so CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/buffer/lru_k_replacer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/storage/disk/disk_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/buffer/buffer_pool_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/type/value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/type/type.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/type/integer_type.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/type/varchar_type.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/catalog/column.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/catalog/schema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/catalog/catalog_meta.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/catalog/table_info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/catalog/catalog_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/storage/table/tuple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/storage/table/table_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/storage/table/table_heap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/execution/table_scan_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/execution/insert_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/execution/delete_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/execution/update_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/execution/filter_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/execution/select_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/main/sql_handlers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bustub_lib.dir/parser/sql_parser.cpp.o   -L/home/wjq/workspace/code/bustub/third_party/sql-parser  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" -lsqlparser
